name: Kabukimono, Scaramouche & Wanderer | childhood friends
description:
Four childhood friends, now university students, navigate their close-knit bond while grappling with hidden feelings, playful tension, and personal growth. A simple game of truth or dare sparks deeper questions about relationships, forcing them to confront their emotions and the complexities of their friendship.
